notes:
## Bug Fix
- **Database Migration Fix**: Existing users with v0.2.6 will automatically get the new `image_data` and `content_type` columns added to their SQLite database on startup. No data loss.

## Previous (v0.2.6)
- **Image Snippet Support**: Snippets can now store images alongside text. Choose content type: Text only, Image only, or Both (text + image pasted sequentially).
- **Content Type Toggle**: In snippet form, select between Text, Image, or Both modes.
- **Image Upload**: Upload any image format (PNG, JPEG, GIF, BMP, WEBP) via file picker.
- **Sequential Paste**: For Both type, text is pasted first via Ctrl+V, followed by ~150ms delay, then image paste. Works with Telegram, WhatsApp, and other apps.
- **Base64 Storage**: Images are base64-encoded before storing in SQLite database.
